Guidelines and obtain approval of the Appropriate Government, or alternatively,

obligations.obligation:
(d) For the procurement of the transmission services under the guidelines,
BPC shall adopt a single stage two envelope tender process featuring Request
for Proposal (RfP).

obligations.obligation:
Order in Petition No. 884/AT/2025
Page 9(h) To ensure competitiveness, the minimum number of qualified bidders
shall be two.
obligations.short_summary: Basic rule-based detection (LLM skipped for speed)

obligations.obligation:
For inter-State transmission system, bids shall be opened in the
office of the CEA by a bid committee comprising of at least one member from
CEA and one member from the BPC.
obligations.short_summary: Basic rule-based detection (LLM skipped for speed)

obligations.obligation:
For inter-State transmission system, CEA
shall constitute a committee for evaluation of the bids with at least one
representative from the CEA and not less than two representatives from the
concerned Regional Power Committees and one independent member.
obligations.short_summary: Basic rule-based detection (LLM skipped for speed)

obligations.obligation:
Further, in case project is inter-regional, there shall be at least one
representative from every concerned RPC.
obligations.short_summary: Basic rule-based detection (LLM skipped for speed)

obligations.obligation:
The technical bids shall be
examined to ensure that the bids submitted meet minimum eligibility criteria set
out in the bid documents on all the technical evaluation parameters.
obligations.short_summary: Basic rule-based detection (LLM skipped for speed)

obligations.obligation:
Only the
bids that meet all elements of the minimum technical criteria set out in the bid
documents shall be considered for further evaluation on the transmission
charges bids.
obligations.short_summary: Basic rule-based detection (LLM skipped for speed)

obligations.obligation:
The online initial price bids shall be electronically opened by the
bid opening committee in the presence of the bid evaluation committee.
obligations.short_summary: Basic rule-based detection (LLM skipped for speed)

obligations.obligation:
The
bidder who has quoted the lowest transmission charge as per the evaluation
procedure shall be considered for the award.
obligations.short_summary: Basic rule-based detection (LLM skipped for speed)

obligations.obligation:
(i) The BPC is required to complete e-reverse bidding after opening of the
initial offer within 75 days.
obligations.short_summary: Basic rule-based detection (LLM skipped for speed)

obligations.obligation:
The procurer may give extended time frame indicated
herein based on the prevailing circumstances, and such alterations shall not be
construed to be deviation from these guidelines.
obligations.short_summary: Basic rule-based detection (LLM skipped for speed)

obligations.obligation:
(j) The TSP shall make an application for the grant of a transmission licence
to the Appropriate Commission within five (5) working days from the date of
execution of the Share Purchase Agreement for acquisition of the SPV.

obligations.obligation:
The
final TSA, along with the certification by the Bid Evaluation Committee, shall be
forwarded to the Appropriate Commission, for the adoption of tariff discovered
from the quoted annual transmission charges during the e-reverse bidding
process in terms of Section 63 of the Act.
